Ticket.title: Raffle Ticket
Ticket.description: Represents an active raffle ticket reservation and drawing status

ticketNumber.description: Unique assigned ticket ID constrained strictly between 0 and 400

assignedAt.description: Timestamp when the ticket was registered

drawn.description: Whether this ticket has been drawn in the raffle

prizeTitle.description: Title of the prize won if drawn

Auth.title: Auth Config
Auth.description: Stores the array of whitelisted admin emails for firestore rule validation
